ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Goal number (e.g., 15 for Goal 15) */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target number (e.g., 15.1 for Target 15.1) */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Code for the indicator (e.g., 15.1.1) */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code for the series (e.g., AG_LND_FRST) */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "release" TEXT /* Release version of the data */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the indicator (e.g., Country, Region) */,
  "units_code" TEXT /* Code for the units of measurement */,
  "units_description" TEXT /* Description of the units of measurement */,
  "reporting_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the reporting type */,
  "reporting_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting type */,
  "nature" TEXT /* Nature of the data (e.g., Estimated, Country data) */,
  "metadata_url" TEXT /* URL to the metadata or documentation for the indicator */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the indicator is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_areas" (
  "geo_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical area */,
  "geo_area_code" INTEGER /* Code for the geographical area */,
  "geo_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical area */,
  "parent_code" INTEGER /* Parent code for the geographical area (e.g., region code) */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent geographical area (e.g., region name) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the geographical area (e.g., Country, Region) */,
  "ISO3" TEXT /* ISO3 code for the country */,
  "UN_Member" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the area is a UN member (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the area */,
  "bounds_code" TEXT /* Code for the bounds (e.g., None, LB, UB) */,
  "bounds_description" TEXT /* Description of the bounds (e.g., None, Lower bound, Upper bound) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographical area */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the geographical area in square kilometers */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the geographical area */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the geographical area */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., Republic, Monarchy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the data from the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for automated data retrieval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
